<!--
Thank you for contributing to Supply Open Sky.
Before submitting, please review CONTRIBUTING.md for the contribution workflow
and the commit message convention used in this project.
-->

## Description

<!--
A clear summary of what this pull request changes and why.
Keep changes focused: one conceptual change per PR.
-->

## Type of change

<!-- Mark with `x` the option that applies. -->

- [ ] Documentation correction (typo, broken link, factual error)
- [ ] Documentation improvement (clarification, restructuring, expansion)
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] New documentation
- [ ] Repository configuration (`.github/`, `.gitignore`, templates)
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Related issues

<!--
Link any issues this PR addresses, e.g. `Closes #12` or `Refs #34`.
If there is no related issue, briefly explain the motivation here.
-->

## Testing performed

<!--
For documentation PRs: have you previewed the rendered Markdown on GitHub?
Have you checked that all links work? For configuration changes: have you
verified the change behaves as intended?
-->

## Documentation updated

<!--
If this PR introduces a concept, term, or component, has it been added to
NOMENCLATURE.md and BLUEPRINT.md as appropriate? Are cross-references
between documents still consistent?
-->

## Breaking changes

<!--
Does this PR break any existing references, link patterns, or document
structure that other materials may rely on?
-->

## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) convention.
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
- [ ] My contribution is licensed under [CC BY 4.0](../LICENSE.md).
